title: Implement #1015 intent and Memory observability enforcement coverage

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement GitHub #1015 by adding focused enforcement coverage for intent verification and Memory observability semantics.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not rewrite Planning closeout, broaden every task into high assurance, or replace human/domain authority with automated judgment.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add small report/startup coverage and minimal fields for Memory checked-none vs not-checked and durable residue routing semantics.
completion_criteria: Tests cover validation success remaining separate from parent/larger intent satisfaction.
Tests cover Memory checked-none vs not-checked and visible durable-residue routing states.
Closeout/report outputs use terminology aligned with skills, transition gates, and next-safe-action packets.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded enforcement-coverage slice is implemented and validated without broad Planning closeout redesign.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Memory consultation states and durable residue visible states are covered by report/startup tests.
